name: Maria
top_pain: Reconciling card spend across two stores burns 6h/week of bookkeeper time.
top_objection: We already use a high-street bank card — why switch?
ideal_opener: I noticed Two Pines opened a second location on Deansgate in January — congrats. How are you splitting card spend between the two right now?
best_pitch_prop: Per-store virtual cards with auto-reconciled receipts.
closing_move: Two 20-minute slots: Tue 10:00 or Wed 10:30 — which works to walk through it with your bookkeeper?

signals.content: Filed change-of-registered-office to add second Deansgate site (Jan 2026).
Posted: 'Hiring an assistant bookkeeper, Manchester — 3 days/week.'
Owner shared a photo of new shopfront opening.

name: Tom
top_pain: Engineering AWS bill is consuming the corporate AmEx limit mid-month — finance can't see categorised spend until 30 days later.
top_objection: We're already on Brex — why would we switch?
ideal_opener: Saw your Series-B announcement last month — congrats. How are you handling AWS spend visibility now that engineering has more autonomy?
best_pitch_prop: Real-time per-team budgets with hard limits and SSO category controls.
closing_move: I have Thursday 16:00 or Friday 09:30 — happy to walk you and your head of finance through a side-by-side with your current Brex setup.

signals.content: Announced $18M Series B led by Northzone (Apr 2026).
Filed allotment of shares — Series B confirmation (Apr 2026).

name: Emma
top_pain: Procurement card spend across 3 shifts can't be matched to job-numbers — finance manually tags 400+ transactions per month.
top_objection: We need it to integrate with Sage — last vendor said they could but it broke.
ideal_opener: I saw Brightline's latest filing — looks like you've grown headcount 18% this year. How is procurement handling card-tagging at that scale?
best_pitch_prop: Per-job-number cards with Sage-line-level export and supervisor approval workflow.
closing_move: Could I get 20 minutes with you and your Sage admin Tuesday at 14:00, or Thursday at 11:30?

signals.content: Filed annual accounts — turnover up 22% YoY (Mar 2026).
Operations head shared 'lean manufacturing tools we use' carousel.

name: Lukas
top_pain: Each restaurant manager runs their own bank card; supplier spend is invisible to the central kitchen until invoices land.
top_objection: GDPR — we don't want a UK-based fintech holding our staff data.
ideal_opener: Tafelrunde added a fourth location in Schwabing last quarter — wie regelt ihr Kartenausgaben über die Standorte hinweg im Moment?
best_pitch_prop: Per-location cards · EU-only data residency · receipt-capture in the buyer's own language.
closing_move: 20 Minuten mit dir und deinem zentralen Buchhalter — Donnerstag 10:00 oder Freitag 09:30?

signals.content: Announced Schwabing opening on Instagram + LinkedIn (Mar 2026).
Featured in Süddeutsche Zeitung — 'four locations, one menu'.
